hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | grep -qE '(tailwind\.config\.js|src/constants/colors\.ts)$' && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"You just edited tailwind.config.js or src/constants/colors.ts. Run /sync-colors now to verify the two stay in sync."}}' || true
